instruction: Plan the kickoff for account 6: schedule an event named 'Kickoff Account 6' on 2026-06-22 with agent 7 and the account's primary contact as attendees, email that contact with subject 'Kickoff scheduled' and a brief body, and raise the priority of account 6's open case 21 to 'High'.
rationale_hint: Primary contact of account 6 must be resolved via the lowest-contact-id convention.

provenance.source_benchmark: PlanBench (Valmeekam et al., 2023); FlowBench plan-generation variant (Xiao et al., 2024); WorkArena L2 compositional (Boisvert et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed scenario over the local CRM seed; mechanical plan validation, plan-length difficulty, and temperature 0 follow PlanBench; plan-generation framing follows FlowBench and WorkArena L2. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: kickoff.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (scenarios, goal specs, action doc); benchmark semantics reference only
